item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 051700Z AUTO 31006KT 280V340 9999 -RA BKN006/// BKN024/// BKN072/// ///CB 13/12 Q1008 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA BKN012TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 051100Z 0512/0612 26008KT 9999 BKN030 TEMPO 0512/0514 BKN008 PROB40 TEMPO 0512/0524 4000 -SHRA BKN012TCU TEMPO 0600/0612 3000 -RA BKN006 PROB40 TEMPO 0610/0612 BKN012
